description:
The AxisMultiViewportPanner component toggles through UIX element's active state, min and max of the RectTransform's anchor. This allows a user to make "pages" in UIX.

}}

fields.ViewportIndex: The current focused viewport UIX element.
fields.AnimationTime: The time it takes to pan across to get to the selected viewport index.
fields.Direction: The direction this animates to get to the selected viewport index.
fields.Viewports: The list of UIX element viewports to pan to.

usage: This is useful if you want to make a slideshow, tab pages for UIX, or anything that you want to have pan across for multiple pages in your design.
